meta.title: Tips for job seekers
meta.description: Practical advice for your job search: tailor your CV, write a clear application, follow up, prepare for interviews and watch the application deadline.

title: Tips for job seekers
intro: A few practical pieces of advice for your job search. None of this is required, but it tends to help.

cv.title: Tailor your CV
cv.body: Tailor your CV to the ad. Highlight the experience and skills that match the requirements of the specific role.

ansokan.title: Write a concrete application
ansokan.body: Be concrete. Describe what you have done and the result it produced, rather than general statements about yourself.

uppfoljning.title: Follow up
uppfoljning.body: Note when you applied and get in touch if you have not heard back within a reasonable time. A short reminder is rarely wrong.

intervju.title: Prepare for the interview
intervju.body: Read up on the employer and the role before the interview. Have examples ready of situations you have handled and what you learned.

deadlines.title: Watch the application deadline
deadlines.body: Many ads close earlier than you expect. An early application has time to be read without a rush.
